base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_missile — a projectile (missile) from 1986 metroid. Missile — larger projectile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Missile — larger projectile; damages hard enemies and opens red doors. Finite ammo from missile-tank pickups (starts 5)
